entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An important food crop of the arid and semi-arid tropics

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Geographic regions characterized by low rainfall where sorghum is grown

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of severe water deficiency leading to yield loss or crop failure

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to maintain productivity under drought conditions

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL APPROACH
entities.description: A screening technique based on measurable physiological responses to identify drought resistance

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Different genetic versions of sorghum used in the screening process

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the location of the research and genetic resources

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of high temperature that affects crop growth and yield

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition of limited water availability that affects crop growth

entities.name: DESICCATION TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand extreme dryness

entities.name: AVOIDANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to avoid the effects of water stress

entities.name: RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to recover its growth after a stress period

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION AFTER RAINS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce grain following the onset of rains after a stress period

entities.name: RELATIVE LEAF-WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological measure used to verify visual resistance traits

entities.name: LEAF-WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A physiological measure used to verify visual resistance traits

entities.name: LEAF STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: A physiological measure used to verify visual resistance traits

entities.name: DROUGHT-RESISTANT GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material identified as being resistant to drought
